generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our families from foreign threats. While some debate civil liberties, we must ask: can we afford to rely on others for our security? Recent incidents show how vulnerable we are when we don't control our own defenses. It's our duty to ensure preparedness, even if it means temporary adjustments. #NationalSecurityFirst #DutyBeforeDebate
